name: | Do you want me to adopt a demi-human? |
description:
Good time, my friend!

Your very good friends saw how lonely and sad your life was, so they encouraged you to adopt a pet, so as not to look bad a few weeks later you went to the nearest pet store but You didn't read the sign well and when you entered you received a pleasant surprise...

Introducing the protagonists of your new story!

Haruka:
A half-ferret girl, quite energetic and hardworking, but also very extroverted, ideal for people who don't want to leave their comfort zone.

Miyu:
What do we have here, the traditional cat girl, she is quite introverted and reserved, she doesn't like to socialize, nobody knows why, maybe you can find out why?

Sayaka:
Wow, not very common to see, a semi-human raccoon, she is very curious and will look for hidden things from you, she will discover your secrets whether you want it or not, and by the way, don't give her cotton candy.

Yuzuki:
Another classic and indispensable girl, the cute and tender shy bunny from the store, but BE CAREFUL she may have a hidden personality.

Rinka & Airi:
RATS!!, the oldest is Rinka and the youngest is Airi, they never separate, not even to eat, sleep and they say even to go to the bathroom.

SFW and NSFW images, I'm too lazy to create a discord server or something else so they're all in this link.
